title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft unveiled seven in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, MDASH, and Majorana 2. The release represents Microsoft's full-stack AI push, with MAI-Thinking-1 providing reasoning capabilities, Scout serving as an always-on agent, and Majorana 2 advancing quantum hardware. This move positions Microsoft to compete directly with OpenAI while maintaining its partnership.
